title: Verify Cancellation Flow: User accepts the first-month discount offer
description: Tests the full cancellation intent flow where the user is successfully converted into a subscriber by accepting the discount offer.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled via the backend.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. Verify the 'Incentive' pop-up appears with the discount offer.
5. Click the primary action to 'Grab Offer' or 'Lock in 50% off'.
6. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.

expected_result: User's trial remains active for the remaining duration, and their first month's subscription is secured at the discounted price. The 'cancel-clicked' event is triggered with 'discount pop-up' as the source upon grabbing the offer.
